final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster for a sci-fi thriller film about the awakening of artificial intelligence.

Style/medium: photorealistic digital compositing, cyberpunk aesthetic, high-contrast editorial poster in the spirit of Blade Runner 2049 key art
Composition: vertical center composition, full-bleed portrait orientation, figure occupying upper two-thirds, lower one-third reserved as title text area, direct eye contact with viewer
Subject: a half-human half-mechanical face — left half is a refined human female face with a warm brown eye, right half exposes intricate circuit boards and metallic skeletal structure with a glowing blue mechanical eye; the two halves merge seamlessly at the center vertical axis
Scene/backdrop: vast digital matrix void — cascading green code characters falling from above in dense vertical streams, deep infinite dark space
Lighting/mood: cold blue ambient fill from below, green code glow casting subtle reflections on the mechanical side, dramatic split-lighting along the center seam, tense and suspenseful atmosphere
Color palette: dominant cold blue and matrix green, warm human skin tone as deliberate contrast anchor on the left half, glowing blue as accent on the mechanical eye
Materials/textures: pore-level human skin texture on the left, precision-machined metal surfaces and hairline circuit traces on the right, visible solder points and fiber-optic filaments
Constraints: lower one-third of frame must remain compositionally clear for title typography overlay; mechanical and organic halves must read as a single unified face at a glance
Avoid: cartoonish or anime stylization, muddy color mixing at the center seam, symmetrical robot face clichés, generic Behance sci-fi glow overload, watermark
